positive: A whimsical, highly detailed cosmic journey featuring a stylized astronaut standing atop a giant bioluminescent crystalline geode. The background shows a nebula spiral of deep indigo and vibrant cyan, contrasted by glowing celestial dust and stylized ringed planets. Focus on clean, bold silhouettes and high contrast between the dark space and the vivid glowing elements. The composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for a graphic print on apparel, utilizing geometric and organic shapes. Style: Psychedelic illustration meets modern Art Deco linework, rendered in a flat, yet richly illuminated style. Volumetric lighting, clean lines, vector aesthetic.
negative: photorealistic, blurred, grainy, artifacts, low detail, ugly, watermark, signature, text, logos, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, copyright, poor composition
